Emily manages a busy dog rescue center located at [facility address] where she currently cares for 25 dogs before the recent weekend events. On Thursday, she welcomed 4 new puppies from [town name], and on Friday, a kind family dropped off a stray dog they discovered near [street name]. This brought her total count up to 30 dogs, but the situation changed on Saturday when 2 families from [city name] decided to adopt 3 dogs each, totaling 6 dogs leaving the shelter.

After these adoptions, Emily now has 24 dogs remaining at her center, a number she tracks in her [logbook name]. She plans to update her website at [website url] to reflect the new availability for potential adopters looking for a furry friend. To ensure the well-being of the remaining dogs, she has scheduled a vet check-up for [date] and will be ordering more supplies from [vendor name]. With the help of her dedicated team, the rescue continues to thrive despite the recent changes in population.
